intro: Between April 12 and April 20, 2026, ZCyberNews published 19 reports on data breaches, with 15 rated as high severity. The threat actors ShinyHunters and Rhysida were prominently active during this period. Their operations impacted a wide range of sectors, including government, hospitality, technology, travel, and education. Geographically, the incidents were concentrated in Europe and North America, with specific focus on the United States and Mexico, alongside several breaches with global reach. This collection highlights a concentrated wave of significant cyber incidents across critical infrastructure and services.
